project.name: hifz_planner
project.description: Flutter app for Quran reading, adaptive hifz planning, and Companion memorization workflow across desktop, mobile, and web

notes: Keep the Adaptive Hifz Path canon and route roadmap continuity through docs/assistant/ROADMAP_ANCHOR.md.
Chromium + Playwright are now part of the local validation surface.
Web support lives in the same Flutter repo with browser-safe storage and service fallbacks.
